keyValueTable.label: Key/value table
keyValueTable.description: Two-column facts such as invoice number and total.

new_invoice.subject: New Invoice
new_invoice.body:
Hello {{customer_name}},

Invoice {{invoice_number}} for {{invoice_total_amount}} has been created. Due date: {{invoice_due_date}}.

domain_information.subject: Domain Information
domain_information.body:
Hello {{customer_name}},

Your domain {{domain}} is now {{resellbiz_domain_status}}. Name servers: {{resellbiz_nameservers}}. Manage it here: {{domain_link}}

hosting_account_information.subject: Hosting Account Information
hosting_account_information.body:
Hello {{customer_name}},

Your hosting service {{service}} is active. Domain: {{domain}}. Control panel: {{virtualmin_control_panel_url}} (username {{virtualmin_control_panel_username}}, password {{virtualmin_control_panel_password}}). Manage it here: {{service_link}}

ticket_opened.subject: Ticket Opened — #{{ticket_id}}
ticket_opened.body:
Hello {{customer_name}},

Your ticket #{{ticket_id}} has been opened with our {{department_name}} team: {{ticket_subject}}

{{ticket_content}}

View ticket

ticket_answered.subject: Ticket Answered — #{{ticket_id}}
ticket_answered.body:
Hello {{customer_name}},

{{staff_name}} from our {{department_name}} team replied to your ticket #{{ticket_id}}: {{ticket_subject}}

{{ticket_reply}}

View ticket

ticket_closed.subject: Ticket Closed — #{{ticket_id}}
ticket_closed.body:
Hello {{customer_name}},

Your ticket #{{ticket_id}} ({{ticket_subject}}) with our {{department_name}} team has been closed.

View ticket

domain_information.intro:
Hello {{customer_name}},

your domain {{domain}} has been registered and is now active.
domain_information.note: Keep your domain contact data current to avoid registry compliance issues.

hosting_account_information.intro:
Hello {{customer_name}},

your hosting account is active. Use the control panel details below to sign in.
hosting_account_information.note: For your security, sign in and change this password after your first login.

hosting_account_suspended.intro:
Hello {{customer_name}},

your hosting service has been suspended.
hosting_account_suspended.note: Contact support if you believe this suspension is incorrect.

hosting_account_terminated.intro:
Hello {{customer_name}},

your hosting service has been terminated.
hosting_account_terminated.note: Backups and retained data depend on your service terms.

invoice_reminder.intro:
Hello {{customer_name}},

this is a friendly reminder that your invoice is due.

new_invoice.intro:
Hello {{customer_name}},

a new invoice has been generated for your account.

password_reset.intro:
Hello {{customer_name}},

use the secure link below to reset your password.
password_reset.note: Ignore this email if you did not request a password reset.

payment_successful.intro:
Hello {{customer_name}},

we received your payment. Thank you.
payment_successful.note: Paid invoices are stored in your client dashboard.

refund_request_sent.intro:
Hello {{customer_name}},

a refund was recorded for this invoice.
refund_request_sent.note: Refund processing time depends on the original payment method.

ticket_answered.intro: Your support ticket has a new answer.

ticket_closed.intro: Your support ticket has been closed.

ticket_opened.intro: A new support ticket was opened.

welcome.intro:
Hello {{customer_name}},

welcome to {{brand_name}}. Your account is ready.
